name: Hot & Sour Fish Soup
recipeIngredient: 2 stalks lemon grass -- tender parts only
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small bowl, combine 2 teaspoons of fish sauce, ginger, and turmeric. Rub the fish on both sides with this mixture and let stand for 5 minutes.
2. In a non-reactive saucepan, bring 5 cups of water and lemon grass to a simmer over medium heat. Simmer the fish for about 4 minutes or until just cooked through. Transfer the fish to a plate to cool slightly.
3. Remove the skin and separate each piece into two pieces (totaling four). Bring the soup back to a simmer and add all remaining ingredients, except the fish.
4. Simmer for 3 minutes. Place a piece of fish in each bowl and ladle hot soup over the fish. Serve with jasmine rice.
